ddls:
CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "user_login" TEXT /* Login name or ID of the user who triggered the event */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Unix timestamp of when the event occurred */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the event */,
  "ledger_event" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the event is a ledger event */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event (e.g., login, logout, file upload, transaction) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the event was triggered */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string for web events */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the event (e.g., success, failure, pending) */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the event (e.g., info, warning, critical) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_user_login FOREIGN KEY ("user_login") REFERENCES users ("user_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, user) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  "failed_login_attempts" INTEGER /* Number of failed login attempts */,
  "last_password_change" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last password change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "searches" (
  "search_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each search */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the search */,
  "query" TEXT /* Search query */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Unix timestamp of when the search was performed */,
  "search_type" TEXT /* Type of search (e.g., event, audit, user) */,
  "results_count" INTEGER /* Number of results returned by the search */,
  "search_status" TEXT /* Status of the search (e.g., completed, failed, in progress) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("search_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_searches_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "search_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each search result */,
  "search_id" INTEGER /* ID of the search that produced this result */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event that matches the search query */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_search_results_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_search_results_search_id FOREIGN KEY ("search_id") REFERENCES searches ("search_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audits" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action performed (e.g., search, update, delete) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Unix timestamp of when the action was performed */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the action */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of action (e.g., search, update, delete) */,
  "affected_entity" TEXT /* Entity affected by the action (e.g., user, event, search) */,
  "entity_id" TEXT /* ID of the affected entity */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the action was performed */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string for web actions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audits_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON array of permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "role_id")
)
